project_type: Static HTML/CSS/JS premium website - no build tools, no bundler
build_system: None - static files served directly. CDN links for Three.js, GSAP, Lenis loaded at runtime in browser.
test_framework: None - visual website, validated by file existence and syntax checking
build_command: No build step required. Validate HTML syntax with: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); if(!html.includes('</html>')) process.exit(1); console.log('Valid HTML structure');"
verification_instructions: 1. Verify all required files exist. 2. Verify index.html has valid structure with all sections. 3. Verify JS files have no syntax errors using node --check. 4. Verify CSS file is non-trivial (>500 lines for a premium site).
setup_instructions: No setup needed - greenfield static site project
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot fetch external resources during build/validation. CDN URLs (Three.js, GSAP, Lenis, Google Fonts) are referenced in HTML but will only load when end user opens the page in their browser. All code must be self-contained in files. Use Node.js for validation only.
contribution_requirements: Standard git workflow on feat/avaiaa-hospitality-website branch
key_patterns: Vanilla JS with ES6+ features, CSS custom properties for theming, modular JS files each handling one concern, all libraries loaded via CDN script tags
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/kiro-agency-landing-page/ - root with index.html, css/ for stylesheets, js/ for scripts, assets/ for future images
